name: vtsSetTriggerParamsEx
title: vtsSetTriggerParamsEx
syntax: long vtsSetTriggerParamsEx (char Target[], eVTSTrigger Trigger, double MinPulseWidth, double RestartTime, dword PreTriggers, dword RestartTriggers, dword ThresholdEventCount, dword ExtSettings);
description: The function configures additional parameters for VT System triggers. Basic parameters are configured using vtsSetTriggerParams.
You can find additional information about VT System triggers on the page Triggers.

parameters.name: Target
parameters.description: Name of the system variable/namespace that will be affected by this function call.

description: The following example shows how triggers can be used to measure the width of a pulse, that is the distance between the rising and falling edge of a pulse.
